column1: #   1. Active orders list + covered HTS: Commerce ITA "Products Subject to
#      pages or CBP ACE AD/CVD messages (trade.cbp.dhs.gov/ace/adcvd/). Use the
#      ALL-OTHERS rate (or a trade-weighted average of firm rates) — the panel
#      cannot carry firm-specific rates (caveat 2 in the loader header).
#   3. country: map the order's country NAME to the tracker country code
#   4. hts: copy the order's listed HTS (2-10 digit). These are "for convenience
#      only" / non-dispositive (caveat 1) — wide prefixes need manual scope
#      review before trusting the HTS-10 fan-out.
#   effective_date order effective date (YYYY-MM-DD); date-gates the rung
#   revoked_date   revocation/sunset date (YYYY-MM-DD) or blank if active

# the format only and are NOT real cash-deposit rates. Do not uncomment until
